calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Michael Strohl, Jr. in Propria Persona. Allyson Buckley Peracca in Propria Persona.

The Parties were sworn in and examined. The Parties verified the petition in open court. The Parties also stated and acknowledged being married on September 20, 2008 in Saint Helena, Ca performed by Cedric Johnson. The Court on its own motion amended on its face the date set forth on the Petition To Establish Fact Of Marriage from 2009 to 2008. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
